content:
I need to count relations where both source and target are within the Types_Layer namespace.

Looking at the Types_Layer namespace, the classes are: CLIOptions, DiagramMetadata, DesignInfo, DesignPatternInfo, ArchitecturalDecision, ProcessInfo, ProcessStage, AnnotationConfig, ClassHighlightConfig, ClassAnnotation, DiagramConfig, GlobalConfig, ArchGuardConfig, MermaidConfig, GitHistoryManifest, CochangeEdge, RiskFactors, ContributorSummary, FileHistoryMetrics, PackageHistoryMetrics, GitHistoryArtifacts, Module, ArchJSON, Entity, Member, Parameter, SourceLocation, Decorator, Relation, ArchJSONMetrics, FileStats, CycleInfo.

The only explicit relation shown in the Types_Layer section is:

`GlobalConfig <|-- ArchGuardConfig`

Both GlobalConfig and ArchGuardConfig are in Types_Layer, so that counts.

All other relations in Types_Layer point to types outside the namespace (like SupportedLanguage, EntityType, Visibility, RelationType, DetailLevel, ArchJSONExtensions, etc.).

{"answer": 1}
